titleStmt.title: SII 29.109: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 109. (A.R. No. B. 544 of 1961-62.) BALLAṬGI, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab setup in the Desai tōṭa.

It records a grant of land for the worship and offerings to the god and repairs of the temple of Kalideva by mahāmaṇḍḷēśvara Ghaṭṭidēvarasa of the Haihaya family during the rule of Chālukya Vikrama chakravarti Rakkasagaṁga. It also registers a grant of land to the god Āditya.
It is dated in the regnal year 2, Prajāpati Āshāḍha. śu. 11, Tuesday, dakasiṇāyaṇa, saṁkrānti. It corresponds to 1151 A.D., June 26, Tuesday.
This record is engraved on the same slab [No. 19 above].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
(śrī) svastyānēka bhaṁgu
ra taraṁga saṁhata vīcīnicaya niritalavaṇābdha hōvasa vaḷaya suvaḷayi
ta gaṁgā pāriyātra tanmadhya dēśādhiśvaraṁ māhiṣmatī puravarēśvaraṁ sahasra bā
hu pratāpaṁ bhūpadiḷāpana tyugra naraśika darppaṇa dhraja virājamānaṁ
dānaśānī naṁ mūlapaṟē ghōṣaṇaṁ nṛparatna bhūṣaṇanahihaya vaṁśō
dbhava kanyāṁganā tanūbhavaṁ śrī mallikārjjuna dēvalabdha vara prasādaṁ vairi
maṇḍaḷika mastaka divya pra(pā)daṁ nāmādi samasta praśasti sahitaṁ śrī
manmahā maṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ ghaṭṭi dēvarasaru śrī maccāḷukya vikrama cakra
vartti rakkasagaṁga dēva varṣada 2 neya prajāpatisaṁvatsara dāṣā
ḍha śuddha 11 maṁgaḷavāradaṁdu dakṣiṇāyana saṁkrānti parvva nimitta
vāgi śrī matkalidēvara naivēdyamā jīrṇnōddhā
kaṁ kētēśvara dēvara kayya mūḍa sarvvabādhā pari hāravāgi
koṭṭageya nela mattarppanneraḍu . ślōkaṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vāyō harēti
vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi [.]
mūlasthāna dēvara muṁdaṇāditya dēvarggā dēvara keyya mūḍalu biṭṭa kari
ya nelaṁ mattarāṟu .
Digital edition of SII 29.109 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
